---
title: "D474_LogisticReg"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(glmnet)
library(tidyverse)
library(ISLR2)
library(boot)
library(here)
library(leaps)
```

```{r}
clickstream <- read.table(here("Data", "EditedData", "clickstream_dc.csv"),
                             header = TRUE,
                             sep = ",")

# Unimportant features to be removed:
clickstream <- clickstream[, !(names(clickstream)%in% c("key", "date","order","sid","clothing_model"))]
```


```{r}
set.seed(543)
train <- sample( 1:nrow(clickstream), size = .7*nrow(clickstream) )
train_df <- clickstream[train, ]
test_df <- clickstream[-train, ]
table(clickstream$hi_clicks_med)
```


## Feature Selection, using MED boundary
```{r}
regfit.full <- regsubsets(hi_clicks_med ~ .-hi_clicks_avg, data = train_df,really.big=T)
(reg.summary <- summary(regfit.full))

par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(reg.summary$rss, xlab = "Number of Variables", ylab = "RSS", type = "l")
plot(reg.summary$adjr2, xlab = "Number of Variables", ylab = "Adjusted RSq", type = "l")
```





## Model Construction, bootstrap testing of features
```{r}

logmod2 <- glm(hi_clicks_med ~ main_category + page + country + location, family = binomial, data = train_df)


# Attempted a boot here:

boot.fn <- function(data, index){
  coef(
  glm(hi_clicks_med ~ main_category + page + country + location, family = binomial, data = data,subset=index)
  )
}

set.seed(1)
cboot <- boot(train_df, boot.fn, 50)
cboot

# test_df <- test_df[test_df$clothing_model != 'P28',]

pred <- predict(logmod2,test_df,type='response')
pred <- ifelse(pred > 0.5, 1, 0)

mean(test_df$hi_clicks_med != pred)
```
```{r}
table(pred, test_df$hi_clicks_med)
```




## Feature Selection, using AVG boundary
```{r}
regfit.full <- regsubsets(hi_clicks_avg ~ .-hi_clicks_med, data = train_df,really.big=T)
(reg.summary <- summary(regfit.full))

par(mfrow = c(2, 2))
plot(reg.summary$rss, xlab = "Number of Variables", ylab = "RSS", type = "l")
plot(reg.summary$adjr2, xlab = "Number of Variables", ylab = "Adjusted RSq", type = "l")
```


## Model Selection, AVG
```{r}
logmod3 <- glm(hi_clicks_avg ~ main_category + page + country + location, family = binomial, data = train_df)


# Attempted a boot here:

boot.fn <- function(data, index){
  coef(
  glm(hi_clicks_avg ~ main_category + page + country + location, family = binomial, data = data,subset=index)
  )
}

set.seed(1)
cboot <- boot(train_df, boot.fn, 50)
cboot

pred <- predict(logmod3,test_df,type = 'response')
pred <- ifelse(pred > 0.5, 1, 0)

mean(test_df$hi_clicks_avg != pred)
```

```{r}
table(pred, test_df$hi_clicks_avg)
```
